'''''Liberty Star''''' was an [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].<ref name="Isard's Revenge" />

At the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]], ''Liberty Star'' and ''[[Tyrant's Bane]]'' helped lead the attacks against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun|Golan II]] platform ''[[Green One]]''.<ref name="Isard's Revenge" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
